amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Recital 47 a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Recital 47 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission



(47a)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

(47a) Such requirements on transparency and on the explicability of AI decision-making should also help to counter the deterrent effects of digital asymmetry and so-called ‘dark patterns’ targeting individuals and their informed consent.

Such requirements on transparency and on the explicability of AI decision-making should also help to counter the deterrent effects of digital asymmetry and so-called ‘dark patterns’ targeting individuals and their informed consent.
